DeadzoneToolTip: Deadzone where the stick movements aren't registered
SwapLeftRightSticksToolTip: Walk with right stick and look with left stick
LookUsingRightStickToolTip: Enable/disable moving the camera with right stick
InvertVerticalLookToolTip: Change 'stick up = look up' to 'stick up = look down'
AutoSprintToolTip: Auto transition from walking to running when stick is more than half pushed
AutoSprintNote: AutoSprint will disable all other sprint settings/binds, except when mounted
AutoStopToggleSprintToolTip: Stop toggle sprint if not moving
